_doc: Clips and tasks that produce a visually distorted SMPL human (broken pose,
implausible limb position, fitting failure). NEVER use any of these in a
hover popup, demo selector, video, screenshot, or any other form of
blocked_tasks            : task label is blocked across every panel.
blocked_per_attr_feature : task label is blocked only for the named
clip looks fine elsewhere but the SMPL fit
happens to flag the specific metric being shown.
blocked_instance_ids     : single (attr, feature, task, actor) instances.
Use when only one actor's fit is bad and the
rest of the same task are fine.
drop any instance whose `task` matches blocked_tasks, OR whose (attribute_short,
feature, task) tuple matches an entry in blocked_per_attr_feature, OR whose
instance_id matches blocked_instance_ids. The bar plot's dot cloud, the hover
popup, and the demo dropdown should all consult this list.
